calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-17-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, September 3, 2015, in Department 525:
Pamela Kahn, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
Konan Pi dba Project Zen and Sharon Thiergartner dba Project Zen, Appellants/Defendants appear as Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
The Court asks the appellants to give a reason why the Court should grant the denial of the Motion to Vacate Judgment. Ms. Thiergartner testifies on her own behalf of the reason and responds to the questions from the Court. Court takes the denial of Motion to vacate Judgment under submission and hears the matter.

Plaintiff/Respondent, Pamela Kahn testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - group exhibits - pain management letter from doctor, evaluations of physical therapy, MRI result, and list of damages.

Defendants/Appellants, Konan Pi and Sharon Thiergarter testifies on their own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court.
They informed the Court that they are co-owners with a group of owners of a corporation called Zen Holistic Health Corporation. Appellants and respondent, agreed up on changing Konan Pi dba Project Zen, etal to Zen Holistic Health Corporation as defendent/appellant.
No evidence is introduced by the appellants.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. New evidence of Respondent, retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2015 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-30-2015 Judgment Entered
